data.name: WelcomeSubtitle
data.value: Your personal student dashboard. Access your exams, view results, and track your progress.

data.name: Card1Desc
data.value: View and take your scheduled exams and assignments.

data.name: Card2Desc
data.value: Take mock exams to prepare for your actual tests.

data.name: Card3Desc
data.value: Check your scores and review past exam feedback.

data.name: Card4Desc
data.value: Access resources and materials provided by your teachers.

data.name: Card5Desc
data.value: Update your personal information and account settings.

data.name: Card6Desc
data.value: Get assistance with technical issues or contact support.
